description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3 Docker image, defines BUNDLE_PATH=vendor, JEKYLL_ENV=production, LC_ALL=C.UTF-8, NOKOGIRI_USE_SYSTEM_LIBRARIES='true' variables, sets a global cache keyed on Gemfile.lock with path vendor/, and three stages: build, test, deploy, with workflow rules to run on the default branch or merge‑request events. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `bundle install` then `bundle exec jekyll build` and publishes the `_site` directory as an artifact. Add a check job in the test stage that allows failure, runs `bundle install` then `bundle exec htmlproofer _site`. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that uses the curlimages/curl image, disables caching, runs only when `$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH`, echoes a deployment message and executes `curl --fail "https://api.render.com/deploy/srv-$RENDER_SERVICE_ID?key=$RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK_KEY&ref=$CI_COMMIT_SHA"` to trigger a Render.com deployment to the production environment at `https://dashboard.render.com/static/srv-$RENDER_SERVICE_ID`.
